code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BusContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();export const useBus=()=>{const context=useContext(BusContext);if(!context){throw new Error('useBus must be used within a BusProvider');}return context;};export const BusProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[searchCriteria,setSearchCriteria]=useState({source:'',destination:'',date:''});const[selectedBus,setSelectedBus]=useState(null);const[selectedSeats,setSelectedSeats]=useState([]);const[bookingDetails,setBookingDetails]=useState(null);const updateSearchCriteria=criteria=>{setSearchCriteria(criteria);};const selectBus=bus=>{setSelectedBus(bus);setSelectedSeats([]);};const toggleSeat=seatNumber=>{setSelectedSeats(prev=>{if(prev.includes(seatNumber)){return prev.filter(seat=>seat!==seatNumber);}else{return[...prev,seatNumber];}});};const clearSelection=()=>{setSelectedBus(null);setSelectedSeats([]);setBookingDetails(null);};const setBooking=details=>{setBookingDetails(details);};const value={searchCriteria,selectedBus,selectedSeats,bookingDetails,updateSearchCriteria,selectBus,toggleSeat,clearSelection,setBooking};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BusContext.Provider,{value:value,children:children});};
